{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial Academies
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Imperial Academies]] are locations from which ancient books were taken.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
